creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
Just spent some time at the “2025 International Cities of Gastronomy Fest, Macao” at Macau Fisherman’s Wharf & it was really fun! ✨🥘🍝🍹🧑‍🍳🌎✨

📍Running from July 11 to 20 there are so many food booths where I got to try dishes from Macao, Mainland cities & other cities around the world all in one place. Each food booth had something different and interesting 🍻

📍 Besides the food, there was also some cooking shows, live entertainment & performance. It’s a great spot if you want to enjoy delicious food with good vibes. If you like exploring new flavors, this event is definitely worth checking out! ✨💃🕺🎸🧑‍🍳✨ Don’t forget to grab exclusive discount vouchers from various e-payment platforms during the fest!

📍 From now on, the Macao Port of the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) will allow nationals who have been granted visa-free entry into Macao & holding valid passports to complete on-board arrival formalities via the arrival vehicle channels without disembarking from their vehicles ✨✈️🚍🌎🇭🇰🇲🇴✨
